## Roadmap phase
<!-- Phase 1-8 from docs/Pilot_Evidence_Roadmap.md -->

## Evidence submitted
<!-- Pilot design, pilot result, measurement model, simulation output, cost model, audit report, or field observation -->

## Hypothesis tested
<!-- What did this evidence try to prove or falsify? -->

## Population / setting
<!-- Who or what was tested? Include location, scale, time period, and participant protections where relevant. -->

## Metrics
<!-- List measured outcomes and thresholds. Use the roadmap metrics where possible. -->

## Results
<!-- What happened? Include failures, unexpected behavior, and negative results. -->

## Failure criteria triggered
<!-- Did any roadmap failure criterion trigger? If yes, name it plainly. -->

## Limits of the evidence
<!-- What should not be inferred from this evidence? -->

## Suggested next action
<!-- Update roadmap, update claims register, add simulation, revise design, reject scale-up, or request more evidence. -->
